response: 40-year-old LeBron James competed in 71 games for the Lakers during the 2024-25 season, posting stellar per-game averages of 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists that defied typical expectations for a player at his veteran career stage. The legendary forward capped off that standout campaign by earning an NBA All-Star selection, a testament to his enduring ability to dominate at the highest level of professional basketball.
